section:
DepthOfFieldEffect Class Reference DepthOfFieldEffect
Represents the DepthOfFieldEffect type.
#include <ScreenEffects.h>

Destroys this DepthOfFieldEffect instance.

Returns the resolved focus distance.

Returns the resolved focus range.

Returns the debug adaptive center valid.

Returns the debug adaptive used fallback.

Returns the debug adaptive fallback distance.

Public Attributes
float focusDistance = 8.0f
float focusRange = 4.0f
float focusBandWidth = 0.85f
float blurRamp = 2.0f
float blurDistanceLerp = 0.35f
float fallbackFocusRange = 6.0f
float blurStrength = 0.65f
float maxBlurPx = 7.0f
int sampleCount = 6
bool debugCocView = false
bool adaptiveFocus = false
Math3D::Vec2 focusUv = Math3D::Vec2(0.5f, 0.5f)
float nearPlane = 0.1f
float farPlane = 1000.0f
bool externalAdaptiveFocusValid = false
float externalAdaptiveFocusDistance = 0.0f
Detailed Description
Represents the DepthOfFieldEffect type.
Member Function Documentation
apply() applyDepthOfFieldEffect DepthOfFieldEffectapply
bool DepthOfFieldEffect::apply (PTexture tex, PTexture depthTex, PFrameBuffer outFbo, std::shared_ptr< ModelPart > quad)[inline], [override], [virtual]
Applies current settings.
Parameters
tex
Value for tex.
depthTex
Value for depth tex.
outFbo
Output value for fbo.
quad
Value for quad.
Returns
True when the operation succeeds; otherwise false.
